name: quantum-ec-add
description: Optimize the qubit-toffoli product for a reversible circuit that adds a quantum elliptic curve point to a classical elliptic curve point.
setupCommand: dnf install -y gcc gcc-c++ make cmake pkg-config || sudo dnf install -y gcc gcc-c++ make cmake pkg-config; command -v cargo >/dev/null || curl https://sh.rustup.rs -sSf | sh -s -- -y --profile minimal; . "$HOME/.cargo/env"; cargo fetch; RUSTFLAGS='-C linker=gcc' cargo build --release --bin experiment
